_readme: In the Bedrock console: Agent builder → Action groups → Add → 'Define with function details'. Use the JSON editor to paste each function block below ONE AT A TIME. Do not paste this whole file.

_actionGroup.name: JobManagement
_actionGroup.description: Manages job cards and tradie assignment for Tradie Connect inbound calls.

functions.name: createJobCard
functions.description: Creates a new job card in DynamoDB with customer and job details. Always call this first.

parameters.name: customerName
parameters.description: Full name of the customer calling in.

parameters.name: serviceType
parameters.description: Type of trade required e.g. plumber, electrician, carpenter.

parameters.name: address
parameters.description: Full street address including suburb, state and postcode.

parameters.name: problemDescription
parameters.description: Description of the problem, preferred time, and urgency e.g. Leaking tap, tomorrow morning, standard.

functions.name: lookupAvailableTradie
functions.description: Finds an available tradie matching the service type and suburb. Call this after createJobCard.

parameters.name: serviceType
parameters.description: Trade type to match, must match what was passed to createJobCard.

parameters.name: suburb
parameters.description: Suburb from the customer address, used to prefer a nearby tradie.

functions.name: assignTradieToJob
functions.description: Assigns the matched tradie to the job card. Call this after lookupAvailableTradie.

functions.name: logJobNotification
functions.description: Logs the notification intent for the assigned tradie. Call this last, after assignTradieToJob.

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Job ID of the assigned job.

parameters.name: tradiePhone
parameters.description: Phone number of the assigned tradie.
